name: Convex Traffic Safety Mirror
shortDescription: Wide-angle mirror for blind-spot visibility at internal road junctions and loading bays.
longDescription: Warehouse aisles, loading bay entrances and factory internal junctions often hide oncoming forklifts and vehicles around a blind corner. A pole or wall-mounted polycarbonate convex mirror gives drivers and pedestrians a wide-angle view around that corner well before they reach it — a low-cost fix that materially cuts internal traffic incidents on sites running mixed pedestrian and vehicle movement. Supplied across four sizes to match the corridor width and viewing distance.

images.alt: Convex Traffic Safety Mirror supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara

specs.label: Typical use
specs.value: Warehouse aisles, loading bays, factory junctions
